---
name: "🧪 Propose a sample project"
about: Suggest a new, runnable edge-AI sample project for the repo
title: "[project] "
labels: ["project", "help wanted"]
---

## Project idea
- **Title:**
- **What the learner builds:**
- **Level:** (beginner / intermediate / advanced)
- **Hardware required:** (e.g. any laptop / Raspberry Pi 5 + Hailo / Jetson)
- **Roadmap phases it exercises:** (e.g. 2 → 4 → 5)

## Quality checklist (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Runs **exactly as written** on the stated hardware
- [ ] One-line/one-block install + exact commands to fetch any model/data
- [ ] Shows **expected output**
- [ ] Code is **heavily commented** (explains *why*)
- [ ] Includes a self-test or trivially verifiable step where possible

<!-- Link any reference implementation or dataset. Keep it vendor-neutral. -->
